chapter_title.ar: باب الْجُنُبِ يَأْكُلُ وَ يَشْرَبُ وَ يَقْرَأُ وَ يَدْخُلُ الْمَسْجِدَ وَ يَخْتَضِبُ وَ يَدَّهِنُ وَ يَطَّلِي وَ يَحْتَجِمُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 33 – The one with sexual impurity eats and drinks, and recites (the Quran), and enters the Masjid, and dyes (hair), and massages, and coats (with henna etc.), and gets cupping done

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/149)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/149)
text: لِلْجُنُبِ أَنْ يَمْشِيَ فِي الْمَسَاجِدِ كُلِّهَا وَ لَا يَجْلِسُ فِيهَا إِلَّا الْمَسْجِدَ الْحَرَامَ وَ مَسْجِدَ الرَّسُولِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, and Muhammad Bin Al Hassan, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Abu Nasr, from Jameel Bin Darraj,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘For the one with sexual impurity is that he can walk into the Masjids, all of them and he cannot sit in them, except for the Sacred Masjid, and Masjid of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> (where he can neither walk into nor sit in them)’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Muhammad and Muhammad ibn al-Hassan have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ibn abu Nasr from Jamil ibn Darraj who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is permissible for one after experiencing sexual relation to walk in all kinds of Masjid but he must not sit in them. This does not apply to Masjid al- Haram and Masjid of the Messenger of Allah.’”
